---
title: "SMF Teaching"
subtitle: "Institute of Strategic Management and Finance · Ulm University"
toc: false
---

> **Internal staff index.** Students access course materials via [Moodle](https://moodle.uni-ulm.de/).

## Courses

- [Research in Finance](courses/research-in-finance/index.qmd)

## How this site works

This site is built from a single GitHub repository using [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Each course folder contains its own syllabus, lectures, assignments, and gradebook. The repository is the **source of truth**; rendered output is published to GitHub Pages and linked from Moodle.

For conventions and AI-assistant workflows, see [`CLAUDE.md`](https://github.com/papa-puma/smaf/blob/main/CLAUDE.md) and [`README.md`](https://github.com/papa-puma/smaf/blob/main/README.md) in the repo.
